title: Fortnight
why_this_song: Fortnight by Taylor Swift (2024) — selected for the English-through-music catalog. Use the sing-along prompts and exercises to drill pronunciation, vocabulary, and listening comprehension.
teaching_notes_md:
## Teaching notes

- Times are estimated from community-synced lyrics and may be off by 1–2 seconds.
- Start with the sing-along prompt, then move to listen-and-fill.
- For B1+ students, focus on the discussion questions.
copyright_notice: Short fair-use lyric excerpts only (Brazilian Lei 9.610/98 art. 46 VIII). No full lyrics stored.

lines: I love you, its ruining my life
I touched you for only a fortnight
I touched you, but I touched you
And for a fortnight there, we were forever running
I touched you, I touched you
I love you, it's ruining my life
I love you, it's ruining my life
I touched you for only a fortnight

exercises.prompt_en: How many times do you hear the word "touched" in the whole song?
exercises.prompt_pt: Quantas vezes você ouve a palavra "touched" na música inteira?

exercises.prompt_en: How many times do you hear the word "fortnight" in the whole song?
exercises.prompt_pt: Quantas vezes você ouve a palavra "fortnight" na música inteira?

exercises.prompt_en: Put these three lines in the order they appear in the song:
exercises.prompt_pt: Coloque estes três versos na ordem em que aparecem na música:

excerpts.text: I was supposed to be sent away
I touched you for only a fortnight

exercises.prompt_en: And these three — put them in the order they appear in the song:
exercises.prompt_pt: E estes três — coloque na ordem em que aparecem na música:

excerpts.text: But they forgot to come and get me
Run into you sometimes, ask about the weather
I love you, it's ruining my life

exercises.prompt_en: If you could ask Taylor Swift one question about "Fortnight", what would it be and why?
exercises.prompt_pt: Se você pudesse perguntar uma coisa para Taylor Swift sobre "Fortnight", o que seria e por quê?

exercises.prompt_en: Rewrite the chorus of "Fortnight" in your own words — keep the meaning but change the style (formal, slang, poetic, whatever you like).
exercises.prompt_pt: Reescreva o refrão de "Fortnight" com suas palavras — mantenha o sentido mas mude o estilo (formal, gíria, poético, o que preferir).

exercises.prompt_en: If you had to summarize "Fortnight" in one sentence to someone who has never heard it, what would you say?
exercises.prompt_pt: Se você tivesse que resumir "Fortnight" em uma frase para alguém que nunca ouviu, o que diria?

exercises.prompt_en: Write the full form of each contraction:
exercises.prompt_pt: Escreva a forma completa de cada contração:

exercises.prompt_en: Describe the mood of "Fortnight" in three adjectives. What part of the song makes you feel that way?
exercises.prompt_pt: Descreva o clima de "Fortnight" em três adjetivos. Que parte da música te faz sentir isso?
